title: Operation and Metric Analysis
short_description: Analyzed job and user metrics using SQL across multiple datasets to measure engagement, retention, and performance.
long_description: Analyzed job and user metrics using SQL across multiple datasets with 4 tables. Developed SQL queries to measure user engagement, retention, and performance across 325,000+ events and 90,000+ email events.

title: Instagram User Analytics
short_description: Analyzed Instagram user interactions and engagement to identify loyal users, inactive users, bot-like behavior, and campaign timing insights.
long_description: Analyzed user interactions and user engagement with the Instagram app using a database containing 7 tables. Delivered actionable insights for 3 cross-functional teams, identified the 5 most loyal users, optimal days for ad campaigns, 13% bot-like users, and 13% inactive users for re-engagement strategy.

title: Student App Data Learning Analysis
short_description: Analyzed student app usage patterns to identify engagement gaps, distractions, and opportunities for targeted coaching feedback.
long_description: Provided actionable coaching feedback by analyzing student app usage data against 3 distinct study patterns. Discovered that the student spent only 67% of test time on the test, with the remaining 33% spent on gaming the device and other distractions.

title: RFM Analysis of e-Commerce Customers
short_description: Performed RFM analysis on e-commerce customer, product, and order datasets to segment customers and identify marketing target groups.
long_description: Performed Recency, Frequency, Monetary (RFM) analysis on three datasets covering 99,990 customers, 29,000 products, and 181,000 orders to segment customers and identify key target groups for marketing strategy optimization.
